summary: Focused c=2 full-attention value-scan scheduling rejection artifact. Manual unroll-4 and pointer __restrict__ variants stayed generated-token green but did not improve clean projection-check or profiler evidence; restrict cleanup was reverted. Final tree is restored to the prior score-scale kernel path and c2 remains below c1.

software.hipcc_version:
HIP version: 7.2.53211-364a905
AMD clang version 22.0.0git (/srcdest/rocm-llvm f58b06dce1f9c15707c5f808fd002e18c2accf7e)
Target: x86_64-pc-linux-gnu
Thread model: posix
InstalledDir: /opt/rocm/lib/llvm/bin

rejected_variants.name: manual_value_scan_unroll4
rejected_variants.reason: Dirty primary c2 run stayed generated-token green but slowed to 109.922 tok/s aggregate, below the prior score-scale/value-scan path.

rejected_variants.name: batch_kernel_pointer_restrict
rejected_variants.code_scope: added __restrict__ qualifiers to batch attention kernel pointer parameters
rejected_variants.reason: Dirty projection looked mildly positive, but clean projection-check repeats were neutral/negative and clean profiler context-kernel time regressed versus the prior score-scale artifact, so the code was reverted.

profiler.raw_trace_not_retained_reason: raw rocprof CSV is large and intentionally left under /tmp; this compact artifact records aggregate evidence only

conclusion.reason: Both value-scan scheduling variants were rejected. The final restored tree keeps generated-token equality green (137 tokens) and avoids retaining a neutral/negative micro-optimization; c2 retained promotion remains blocked by aggregate_vs_c1<1.

commands.primary_verify_after_revert: active loop verify command at final clean commit 958b28d3 with HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1; output /tmp/hipengine-e2e-native-c2-512-128.json
commands.guard_after_revert: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 -m compileall -q hipengine tests scripts && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 pytest -q tests/test_generation_batch_scheduler.py tests/test_generation_qwen35_paro.py tests/test_qwen35_resident_batch_layout.py tests/test_kvcache_policy.py tests/test_kvcache_spans.py tests/test_server_api.py -q && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 2 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c2.json && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 8 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c8.json
commands.restrict_projection_checks: Two HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 retained-bench projection checks under restrict candidate commit a0f86b8e
commands.restrict_profile: rocprofv3 --kernel-trace --output-format csv -d /tmp/hipengine-e2e-native-c2-restrict-profile-clean-iter112 -- env HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_retained_bench.py ... --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-native-c2-restrict-profiled-clean-iter112.json
